faq.q: Can you guarantee a visa approval?
faq.a: No guarantee possible, but we help identify common risks. Immigration authority has final say—we're a risk warning tool.

faq.q: Do immigration lawyers or agents endorse this?
faq.a: Already partnering with senior lawyers and agents who review our data; they recommend it to applicants.
Zero identity info storage; we only collect anonymized rejection cases and hospital feedback to improve the system.
